title: Middle-Aged and Gallstones: 7 Herbal Tinctures for a Better Tomorrow
description: Silybum marianum tinctures, also known as milk thistle tinctures, have been traditionally used to help with gallstones due to their anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The main constituents of milk thistle, including silymarin and silibinin, work by protecting the liver cells from damage and promoting the regeneration of new cells. This can help reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with gallstones, such as abdominal pain and nausea. Silymarin also has cholere...
